data[0] = 32'b000000000101_00000_000_00001_0010011; // addi x1, x0, 5
data[1] = 32'b000000000101_00000_000_00010_0010011; // addi x2, x0, 5
data[2] = 32'b000000000111_00000_000_00011_0010011; // addi x3, x0, 7
data[3] = 32'b111111111111_00000_000_00100_0010011; // addi x4, x0, -1
data[4] = 32'b000000000000_00000_000_10100_0010011; // addi x20, x0, 0

data[5] = 32'b0000000_00010_00001_000_01000_1100011; // beq x1, x2, L1
data[6] = 32'b000000000001_10100_000_10100_0010011; // addi x20, x20, 1   (skipped)
data[7] = 32'b000000000010_10100_000_10100_0010011; // L1: addi x20, x20, 2

data[8] = 32'b0000000_00010_00001_001_01000_1100011; // bne x1, x2, L2
data[9] = 32'b000000000100_10100_000_10100_0010011; // addi x20, x20, 4

data[10] = 32'b0000000_00011_00001_100_01000_1100011; // L2: blt x1, x3, L3
data[11] = 32'b000000001000_10100_000_10100_0010011; // addi x20, x20, 8   (skipped)

data[12] = 32'b0000000_00001_00011_101_01000_1100011; // L3: bge x3, x1, L4
data[13] = 32'b000000010000_10100_000_10100_0010011; // addi x20, x20, 16  (skipped)

data[14] = 32'b0000000_00001_00100_110_01000_1100011; // L4: bltu x4, x1, L5
data[15] = 32'b000000100000_10100_000_10100_0010011; // addi x20, x20, 32

data[16] = 32'b0000000_00001_00100_111_01000_1100011; // L5: bgeu x4, x1, L6
data[17] = 32'b000001000000_10100_000_10100_0010011; // addi x20, x20, 64  (skipped)

data[18] = 32'b0000100_10100_00000_010_00000_0100011; // L6: sw x20, 128(x0)
